channel.title: About on Val. Lucet
channel.description: Recent content in About on Val. Lucet

item.title: About
item.description: About Me I am an Ecologist at the consulting firm APEX RMS, and an R package developer (and aspiring Research software engineer) at Concordia Univeristy. I am especially interested in reproducibility and open science. On my free time I love to bird at the Montreal Mont-Royal park. Originally from 🇫🇷 but increasingly 🇨🇦. R packages I have developped and/or contributed the following R 📦:

item.title: Contact
item.description: Email: valentin.lucet@gmail.com Mailing Address 221B, Baker Street London United Kingdom Social Facebook Twitter Google+

item.title: Teaching Resources
item.description: Workshops A small workshop geared toward R users, made by collating different open source material and aimed at teaching the basics of the version control, with both the git command and Rstudio as a git interface.
